title: calamaria humilior
intro: Calamaria humilior, also known as the "Screw Pine," is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamaria humilior include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Calamaria humilior can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
